name: Phasmophobia Profile
description: Shows a Phasmophobia-style profile using Steam profile data, playtime, achievements, and editable ghost-hunter stats.
author: Akashsuu

defaults.descriptionTemplate:
**Steam**
SteamID: `{steam_id}`
Status: `{persona_state}`
Profile: {profile_link}

**Phasmophobia**
Playtime: `{playtime}`
Achievements: `{achievements}`
Perfect Games: `{perfect_games}`
Level: `{phasmo_level}`
Prestige: `{prestige}`
Favorite Map: `{favorite_map}`
Favorite Ghost: `{favorite_ghost}`
Difficulty: `{difficulty}`
